message:
Add timer unref and update SSRF tests for TEST-NET ranges

heartbeat.ts:
- Add .unref() to heartbeatInterval and cleanupInterval timers
- Allows graceful process exit without waiting for heartbeat timers
- Consistent with other timer handling in the codebase

url-security.test.ts:
- Update test to check 203.0.113.1 is blocked (TEST-NET-3 documentation range)
- Previously expected 203.0.113.0/24 to be allowed as "public"
- Add explicit tests for all three TEST-NET documentation ranges
- Change 203.0.113.1 to 9.9.9.9 in "allows public IP" test

Also includes routine beads metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
